# 🎌 For the Culture

> AI-powered recommendations for anime, manga, manhwa, web novels, and the lifestyle to match.

**Live:** [for-the-culture.onrender.com](https://for-the-culture.onrender.com)

---

## Screenshots

<div align="center">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="32%" alt="Search UI"/>
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="32%" alt="Anime recommendations"/>
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="32%" alt="Merch section"/>
</div>

---

## What It Does

Enter a title you love (like Naruto or Solo Leveling) or pick filters by medium, genre, mood, and length. Claude AI returns:

- **5 media recommendations** — anime, manga, manhwa, manhua, light novels, web novels, movies, or live action — with cover art pulled from MyAnimeList
- **6 lifestyle & merch picks** — specific real products across clothing, posters, shoes, jewelry, tattoo ideas, and figures with direct links to Amazon, Hot Topic, Crunchyroll Shop, Etsy, StockX, and more

Click any card to open a modal with full details, where to watch/stream, and where to buy hard copies.

---

## Features

- 🤖 AI-powered recommendations via Claude (Anthropic API)
- 🖼️ Anime/manga cover art via Jikan (MyAnimeList API)
- 🛒 Direct store links — Amazon, Hot Topic, Crunchyroll, Etsy, StockX, BoxLunch, FYE
- 📺 Watch/stream links per recommendation (Crunchyroll, Netflix, etc.)
- 🕐 Search history saved locally
- 🔗 Shareable links — copy a URL with your search baked in
- 📱 Mobile responsive

---

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Tech |
|-------|------|
| Frontend | HTML, CSS, JavaScript |
| Backend | Node.js (HTTP server) |
| AI | Claude Sonnet (Anthropic API) |
| Anime Data | Jikan API (MyAnimeList) |
| Hosting | Render |

---

## Run Locally

### 1. Install Node.js
Download from [nodejs.org](https://nodejs.org)

### 2. Clone the repo
```bash
git clone https://github.com/AjHy2003/For-The-Culture--.git
cd For-The-Culture--
```

### 3. Set your API key
```bash
# Windows PowerShell
$env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="your_key_here"

# Mac/Linux
export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="your_key_here"
```

Get your key at [console.anthropic.com](https://console.anthropic.com)

### 4. Start the server
```bash
node server.js
```

### 5. Open in browser
Go to [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000)

---

## Project Structure

```
For-The-Culture--/
├── index.html    — full UI (HTML + CSS + JS)
├── server.js     — Node.js backend (keeps API key secure)
└── README.md
```
